payload.message:
Config fix needed urgently - Guillermo asked for this:

1. Edit /data/workspace/openclaw.jsonc
2. In agents.defaults.tools array, add "message" if not present
3. Add this block under agents.defaults: "tools": { "sessions": { "visibility": "agent" } }
4. Run: openclaw gateway restart

Reply in #command-center when done. If you can't edit files, say so and I'll use Railway exec.
